member.name: M:FitnesTracker.AuthenticationController.RefreshToken(FitnesTracker.RefreshRequestDTO)
member.summary: Refresh token.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.AuthenticationController.Logout(FitnesTracker.RefreshRequestDTO)
member.summary: Logout user and invalidate refresh token.
member.param: Refresh request dto containing the token to invalidate.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.AuthenticationController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get paginated list of all users.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.AuthenticationController.Login(FitnesTracker.UserLoginDTO)
member.summary: Authenticate user and return access token.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.AuthenticationController.Register(FitnesTracker.UserRegisterDTO)
member.summary: Register a new user and return access token.
member.response: User registered successfully, returns auth token.
Invalid registration data or user already exists.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get paginated list of all custom programs.
member.response: Returns paginated list of custom programs.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramController.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.CustomProgramCreateDTO,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new custom program.
member.param: ID of the user creating the program.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramController.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramController.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.CustomProgramUpdateDTO)
member.summary: Update custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramController.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramV2Controller.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get paginated list of all custom programs.
member.response: Returns paginated list of custom programs.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramV2Controller.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.CustomProgramCreateV2DTO,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new custom program (V2).
member.param: ID of the user creating the program.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramV2Controller.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramV2Controller.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.CustomProgramUpdateDTO)
member.summary: Update custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramV2Controller.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete custom program by ID.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.ConfirmEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Checking user authorization.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.GetAll(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all users from website.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get user by id async.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete user by id.
member.returns: Bool value in method and succsess status to user.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.UserUpdateDTO)
member.summary: Update user by id async.
member.param: User update dto with id, name and lastname feilds.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserController.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.UserCreateDTO)
member.summary: Create user by async.
member.param: User create DTO with feilds: name, lastname.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of all users.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.GetTokenAsync(FitnesTracker.RefreshRequestDTO)
member.summary: Validates the refresh token, revokes it, and issues a new access and refresh token pair. Throws UnauthorizedAccessException if the token is invalid or expired.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.Register(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a new user, sends a confirmation email, and returns an access and refresh token pair. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the email is already taken.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.Login(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs in a user by email and password, revokes any existing refresh token, and returns a new token pair. Throws KeyNotFoundException if user not found, UnauthorizedAccessException if password is wrong.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.Logout(System.String)
member.summary: Revokes the given refresh token to log the user out. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the token is invalid or already revoked.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.Authentication.GenerateToken(FitnesTracker.User)
member.summary: Generates a signed JWT access token for the given user. Expires in 60 minutes.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.CustomProgramCreateV2DTO,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new custom program from the provided DTO and assigns the creator.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of all custom programs.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all custom programs. May return an empty list.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.CustomProgramCreateDTO,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new custom program (v1) from the provided DTO and assigns the creator.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a custom program by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.CustomProgramUpdateDTO)
member.summary: Updates a custom program by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.CustomProgramService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a custom program by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found. Returns true on success.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.EmailService.SendEmailAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sends an HTML email via SMTP. Skips sending if SkipEmailSending is set to true in config.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.EmailService.ConfirmEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Confirms a user's email using the provided token. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the token doesn't match any user, SecurityTokenExpiredException if the token is expired.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of all exercises.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetPagedAsync(FitnesTracker.ExerciseQueryParameters)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of exercises using pagination params. Throws KeyNotFoundException if nothing is found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetFilteredExercisesAsync(FitnesTracker.ExerciseQueryParameters)
member.summary: Returns a filtered paged list of exercises based on query parameters. Throws KeyNotFoundException if nothing is found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetByTitleAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets an exercise by title. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetByMuscleGroupAsync(FitnesTracker.MuscleGroup)
member.summary: Gets all exercises by muscle group. Throws KeyNotFoundException if none found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all exercises. May return an empty list.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.ExerciseRequestDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new exercise from the provided DTO.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets an exercise by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.ExerciseRequestDTO)
member.summary: Updates an exercise by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.ExerciseService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes an exercise by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if not found. Returns true on success.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.StandardProgramService.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of standard programs by page number and page size.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.StandardProgramService.GetPagedAsync(FitnesTracker.ExerciseQueryParameters)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of standard programs based on pagination params. Throws KeyNotFoundException if page is not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.StandardProgramService.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Returns all standard programs without pagination.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.StandardProgramService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a standard program by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the program is not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserService.GetAllAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of users by page number and page size.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserService.CreateAsync(FitnesTracker.UserCreateDTO)
member.summary: Creates a new user and saves it to the database. Returns the created user.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserService.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a user by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the user is not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserService.UpdateAsync(System.Int32,FitnesTracker.UserUpdateDTO)
member.summary: Updates an existing user by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the user is not found.

member.name: M:FitnesTracker.UserService.DeleteAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a user by ID. Throws KeyNotFoundException if the user is not found. Returns true on success.
